name: sophia-operator
description: SophiaTV operating workflow for futuristic site work, assistant handoff, smoke testing, troubleshooting, and launch readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Build, verify, troubleshoot, and hand off SophiaTV work in business format.
interface.longDescription: A project-local operating plugin for SophiaTV. It captures the workflow used to upgrade the site: business-first planning, futuristic UI standards, safe browser verification, local smoke tests, production readiness checks, troubleshooting, and Codex/Claude/Cursor handoff.
defaultPrompt: Use the Sophia Operator workflow to complete the next SophiaTV website task.
Run SophiaTV smoke checks and report launch blockers.
Review this SophiaTV change in business handoff format.
